summary:
Iteration 10 — Checkout layout polish verification at 412x1200 (mobile). Verified (1) all FloatInput/FloatSelect heights are 48px (h-12), (2) Delivery field order is country -> full_name -> address -> apartment -> city/state/pincode (row) -> phone -> landmark — phone is NOT next to full_name, (3) 'Secure Checkout' h2 renders on ONE line (height 28px == lineHeight 28px, ratio 1.0) with a small gray

subtitle below, (4) 'Credit / Debit Card' title renders on ONE line (titleHeight 20px == lineHeight 20px, not wrapped) with VISA/MC/AMEX/+more brand badges sitting on the SAME row to its right (titleTop == brandsTop == 1442.5, sameRow=true). Functional regression: COD order submit POST /api/orders -> 200 with order_number GC-E027B676; PaymentProcessing overlay shown. Backend regression test_iteration5.py: 10/10 PASSED. Pre-existing card_extra_fields render container intact (no extras configured in current settings, so cf-* selectors empty by design; billing_email + billing_phone fields visible inside Card row).
critical_code_review_comments: Minor (pre-existing, not part of this iteration): image src='' warning in React console — 'An empty string passed to the src attribute'. Likely from resolveImageUrl returning '' for cart item when product.main_image is undefined. Not blocking but should pass null instead.
Checkout.jsx is now ~850 lines and could be split (FloatInput/FloatSelect/Section/CardBrandBadges/PaymentRow/OrderSummary into separate files) for maintainability, but not blocking.
test_credentials: admin@glowcamp.com / GlowCamp@2026 (not exercised in this iteration; pure UI/regression).
seed_data_creation: localStorage glowcamp_cart_v1 seeded with [{offer_key:'single', title:'Single GlowCamp Lamp', quantity:1, unit_price:29.99}] to land on /checkout with items. One COD order created: GC-E027B676 (TEST_iter10b@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Checkout submit button data-testid is 'checkout-submit-btn' (from TID.checkoutSubmit). Inputs are id-based selectors: #email #full_name #phone #address #apartment #city #state #pincode #landmark #billing_email #billing_phone. Payment tiles: data-testid='pm-card' / 'pm-paypal' / 'pm-cod'. To reach /checkout with items, seed localStorage glowcamp_cart_v1 first.
